name: 24 Precision Golf
address: 4929 E Chandler Blvd Suite 401-403, Phoenix, AZ 85048
about: 24 Precision Golf is an indoor golf facility that provides a state-of-the-art simulation experience powered by Golfzon TwoVisionNX technology. The venue features advanced simulators with moving swing plates, high-speed camera sensors, and an auto-tee system, designed to replicate realistic golf conditions for players of all skill levels. Pricing is offered on a per-bay-hour basis, with sessions available for 1, 2, or 3 hours, making it suitable for both casual players and those looking for serious practice. The facility also hosts leagues, tournaments, and corporate events, offering a comprehensive golf destination year-round.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced GOLFZON TwoVisionNX simulator technology with moving swing plates for realistic lie simulation
High-speed camera sensors capturing 400 frames per second for zero-latency feedback
Auto-tee and ball retrieval system to maintain a fast pace of play
Climate-controlled environment ideal for year-round play in Arizona
Access to over 260 virtual courses, including world-famous layouts

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food available via the Smokehouse Swing Lunch Special with Southern-style plates from Sweet Magnolia Smokehouse. BYOB policy not specified.
No information provided regarding alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulator with moving swing plate and motion plates, featuring Unreal Engine 5 graphics. High-speed camera sensors capture 400 frames per second for instant feedback.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility does not specify whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the most accurate simulation experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a lunch special with food from Sweet Magnolia Smokehouse. There is no mention of a BYOB policy, so it is best to inquire directly about external food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While the exact time for 18 holes is not specified, the auto-tee system and high-speed sensors are designed to minimize delays, allowing for a faster pace of play compared to traditional golf.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, 24 Precision Golf offers junior golf camps and lessons, making it a suitable environment for young golfers to learn and practice in a safe setting.
